headline: Attention Retirees: This 51-Year Dividend Aristocrat Is Secretly Riding a Multi-Billion Dollar Cash Wave
summary: If you are building a retirement income portfolio, Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) is one of the few payroll-fueled cash machines worth a hard look right now. The stock is down 25.24% over the past year, but the dividend engine underneath has only gotten stronger. The question I want to answer: is this payout actually as ... headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for May 30, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending May 30, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 25,500 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).

headline: Intuit Stock's Real Growth Story Isn't The One You're Watching
summary: The market is rightly focused on the company's struggles in do-it-yourself tax, but it might be missing a massive and much more lucrative business taking over from within.
